R Notebook

Tables

By default, R Markdown displays data frames and matrixes as they would be in the R terminal (in a monospaced font). If you prefer that data be displayed with additional formatting you can use the knitr::kable function, as in the .Rmd file below. This file is available here on RStudio Cloud.

Note the use of the results='asis' chunk option. This is required to ensure that the raw table output isn’t processed further by knitr.

LS0tDQp0aXRsZTogIlIgTm90ZWJvb2siDQpvdXRwdXQ6IGh0bWxfbm90ZWJvb2sNCi0tLQ0KDQojIFRhYmxlcw0KDQpCeSBkZWZhdWx0LCBSIE1hcmtkb3duIGRpc3BsYXlzIGRhdGEgZnJhbWVzIGFuZCBtYXRyaXhlcyBhcyB0aGV5IHdvdWxkIGJlIGluIHRoZSBSIHRlcm1pbmFsIChpbiBhIG1vbm9zcGFjZWQgZm9udCkuIElmIHlvdSBwcmVmZXIgdGhhdCBkYXRhIGJlIGRpc3BsYXllZCB3aXRoIGFkZGl0aW9uYWwgZm9ybWF0dGluZyB5b3UgY2FuIHVzZSB0aGUgYGtuaXRyOjprYWJsZWAgZnVuY3Rpb24sIGFzIGluIHRoZSAuUm1kIGZpbGUgYmVsb3cuIFRoaXMgZmlsZSBpcyBhdmFpbGFibGUgW2hlcmVdKGh0dHBzOi8vcG9zaXQuY2xvdWQvY29udGVudC8xODE5NDYpIG9uIFJTdHVkaW8gQ2xvdWQuDQoNCiFbXShodHRwczovL2QzM3d1YnJma2kwbDY4LmNsb3VkZnJvbnQubmV0LzA5NDY3MjUxYTIxOWMzYzZiMmRhZTJiZjEzNjdlNTczNmE5ZWY3OGMvZmVlZWEvbGVzc29uLWltYWdlcy90YWJsZXMtMS1rYWJsZS5wbmcpDQoNCk5vdGUgdGhlIHVzZSBvZiB0aGUgYHJlc3VsdHM9J2FzaXMnYCBjaHVuayBvcHRpb24uIFRoaXMgaXMgcmVxdWlyZWQgdG8gZW5zdXJlIHRoYXQgdGhlIHJhdyB0YWJsZSBvdXRwdXQgaXNu4oCZdCBwcm9jZXNzZWQgZnVydGhlciBieSBrbml0ci4NCg==
